mapper.select: SELECT a.svc_genre_id, c.chnl_id, c.chnl_nm, f.track_id, -- g.artist_id, h.album_id, i.album_img_url, i.album_img_size FROM tb_svc_genre A /* 차트로 변경 */ JOIN tb_svc_genre_popularity_chnl b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_genre_id JOIN tb_chnl c ON b.chnl_id = c.chnl_id JOIN tb_map_chnl_track d ON c.chnl_id = d.chnl_id JOIN tb_track e ON d.track_id = e.track_id JOIN ted_track f ON e.track_id = f.track_id -- JOIN ted_artist g ON f.artist_id = g.artist_id JOIN ted_album h ON f.album_id = h.album_id JOIN tb_album_img i ON h.album_id = i.album_id WHERE a.main_disp_std_yn = 'Y' AND b.disp_sn = 1 AND c.rank_chnl_type IN ('TOP100', 'NEW') AND d.track_sn = 1 ORDER BY a.main_disp_sn LIMIT 12

SELECT aa.svc_genre_id, cc.chnl_id, cc.chnl_nm, ff.track_id, -- gg.artist_id, hh.album_id, ii.album_img_url, ii.album_img_size FROM ( SELECT /* 1. 선호 장르에 매핑된 서비스 장르가 1개: 장르 기준 제공 */ 10 ord, b.update_dtime, d.svc_genre_id FROM TB_CHARACTER a JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN TB_PREFER_GENRE C ON B.PREFER_GENRE_ID = C.PREFER_GENRE_ID JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, disp_sn, count(*) AS svc_genre_cnt FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.svc_genre_cnt = 1 UNION SELECT /* 2-1. 선호 장르에 매핑된 서비스 장르가 N개 이고 아티스트 미선택: 서비스 장르의 3뎁스 동일명 디폴트 설정:사용 장르 기준 제공 */ 21 ord, b.update_dtime, f.svc_genre_id FROM tb_character a JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN tb_prefer_genre c ON b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, disp_sn, count(*) AS svc_genre_cnt FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, count(*) AS prefer_genre_cnt FROM tb_prefer_genre_artist GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) e ON c.prefer_genre_id = e.prefer_genre_cnt JOIN tb_svc_genre f ON d.svc_genre_id = f.svc_genre_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.svc_genre_cnt > 1 AND f.browser_disp_std_yn = 'Y' #3뎁스 동일명 디폴트 설정:사용 으로 변경 AND e.prefer_genre_id IS NULL UNION SELECT /* 2-2. 선호 장르에 매핑된 서비스 장르가 N개 이고 아티스트 선택: 선호 아티스트 국가와 장르의 최상위 장르(1레벨) 구분으로 매핑된 장르 기준 제공 */ 22 ord, c.update_dtime, e.svc_genre_id FROM tb_character a JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN tb_prefer_genre_artist C ON b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, disp_sn, count(*) AS svc_genre_cnt FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id JOIN ( SELECT x.svc_genre_id, x.parents_svc_genre_id, x.svc_genre_nm, x.level, CASE ( CASE level WHEN 1 THEN svc_genre_id WHEN 2 THEN parents_svc_genre_id WHEN 3 THEN (SELECT parents_svc_genre_id FROM tb_svc_genre WHERE svc_genre_id = x.parents_svc_genre_id) END ) WHEN 1 THEN 'KOR' WHEN 2 THEN 'KOR' ELSE 'FOR' END AS root_svc_genre FROM tb_svc_genre X ) e ON d.svc_genre_id = e.svc_genre_id JOIN ( SELECT b.character_no, b.prefer_genre_id, b.artist_id AS prefer_artist_id, CASE C.nation_cd WHEN 'KOR' THEN 1 ELSE 'FOR' END AS artist_nation FROM tb_character A JOIN tb_character_prefer_artist b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} ) f ON d.prefer_genre_id = f.prefer_genre_id and e.root_svc_genre = f.artist_nation WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.svc_genre_cnt > 1 ) aa JOIN tb_svc_genre_popularity_chnl bb ON aa.svc_genre_id = bb.svc_genre_id JOIN tb_chnl cc ON bb.chnl_id = cc.chnl_id JOIN tb_map_chnl_track dd ON cc.chnl_id = dd.chnl_id JOIN tb_track ee ON dd.track_id = ee.track_id JOIN ted_track ff ON ee.track_id = ff.track_id -- JOIN ted_artist gg ON ff.artist_id = gg.artist_id JOIN ted_album hh ON ff.album_id = hh.album_id JOIN tb_album_img ii ON hh.album_id = ii.album_id WHERE bb.disp_sn = 1 AND cc.rank_chnl_type IN ('TOP100', 'NEW') ORDER BY aa.ord ASC, aa.update_dtime DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT a.prefer_genre_id, a.prefer_genre_nm FROM tb_prefer_genre a INNER JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.prefer_genre_id = b.prefer_genre_id WHERE b.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.use_yn = 'Y'
